reviewer: agent matrix pass (headless Chrome, real download+run, first-visit + cached auto-init, light+dark, mobile+desktop) — revision 2

rubric.evidence: conformance (wasm, headless no-GPU): 2✓ 0✗ 0▨ 0◍ — loads-clean=pass, calls-real-inference=pass. screenshots: reports/responsive/screens/camembert-fill-mask/desktop.png, reports/responsive/screens/camembert-fill-mask/mobile.png

Agent verdict — REAL WASM run (Xenova/camembert-base, AutoModelForMaskedLM): 'Paris est la <mask> de la France.' → capitale (logit 18.70) then Capitale/ville/métropole; logits tensor [1,seq,32005]; 90 ms. Ladder confirmed real French output: wild 'Ce n'est pas la mer à <mask>.' → boire; multi-model 'Le petit chat <mask> …' → joue. Correct shape + semantics, not fake. | conformance: io-shape-semantic=manual.

conformance (wasm, headless no-GPU): 5✓ 0✗ 0▨ 0◍ — declares-model-id=pass, declares-task=pass, declares-backend=pass, declares-quantisation=pass, inference-off-main-thread=pass. At-a-glance links Xenova/camembert-base, states fill-mask · WASM · q8.

Agent verdict — fresh profile shows 'Download model (~110 MB)'; after load the shared loader auto-inits to 'Model ready' with a 'Clear cached model' control; a returning visit (same profile) auto-inits from the transformers.js cache with NO Load click and re-runs the sample. The optional multilingual comparison keeps its own on-demand 'Download model (~280 MB)' button (XLM-RoBERTa, user-initiated). | conformance: shared-auto-init-loader=pass, auto-init-on-cached=manual.

Agent verdict — streamed download progress on first load; Retry surfaced on failure by the shared loader; a live #runStatus region reports 'add a <mask>' / prediction errors; offline reuse via the transformers.js cache. Runs on the WASM path (no GPU); headless no-GPU run produced real French fills. | conformance: live-status-region=pass, errors-on-the-page=pass, honest-progress-retry-offline=manual, runs-without-webgpu-fallback=manual.

Agent verdict — sentence input, French sample chips, Insert-<mask> button, top-k slider, clickable prediction rows (fill the mask), the on-demand comparison loader, and the ladder tools (autocomplete accept/reset, register chips, Fill&tag) all operable and keyboard-accessible; verified headless across all five pages. | conformance: controls-operable=manual.

Agent verdict — predictions + logits are produced by the on-device AutoModelForMaskedLM run (real output samples recorded above); the multi-model rung tags the literally filled-in sentence via a second on-device CamemBERT POS model. No canned result anywhere. | conformance: no-fake-output=manual.

conformance (wasm, headless no-GPU): 2✓ 0✗ 0▨ 0◍ — images-have-alt=pass, buttons-have-names=pass. role=status aria-live #runStatus + loader status; labelled input + slider; prediction rows are keyboard-activatable buttons.

Agent verdict — desktop 1280 and mobile 360×740 DPR3 both render with no horizontal overflow (measured 0px), legible text, wrapped at-a-glance table, <mask> shown as code, chips flex-wrap, and the prediction grid collapses (logit column hidden) under 560px; light + dark screenshots reviewed (reports/responsive/screens/camembert-fill-mask/). | conformance: responsive-desktop=pass, responsive-mobile=pass, parity-both-classes=manual.

Agent verdict — the masked-LM forward pass + softmax over the 32k vocab runs in a Web Worker; typing is debounced (350 ms) so it never triggers a blocking run; the two-model comparison runs both forwards off-thread via Promise.all. Main thread stays responsive; 0 console errors across all pages. | conformance: inp-stays-low=manual.

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Keep INP low — keep heavy JS off the interaction path.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — the masked-LM forward pass + softmax over the 32,005-token vocabulary runs in a Web Worker; typing is debounced (350 ms).
guidanceConsulted.evidence: headless: 90 ms fill in the worker, page responsive, 0 console errors

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Offload / break up long main-thread tasks.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — inference is off the main thread (worker.js runs AutoModelForMaskedLM); the UI only renders the returned top-k.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: worker.js; fillmask.js debounces input; comparison uses Promise.all of two off-thread runs

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Avoid fixed widths that overflow narrow viewports; let content wrap.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — flex-wrap sample chips + a prediction grid that collapses columns (hides the logit column) under 560px; at-a-glance table wraps.
guidanceConsulted.evidence: responsive-mobile=pass at 360px; measured 0px horizontal overflow; mobile screenshot reviewed

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Accessible form controls with clear, associated labels; don't rely on placeholder.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — the sentence <input> has an associated <label>; the top-k slider is labelled; sample/register chips are real buttons in labelled groups.

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Announce dynamic errors in an aria-live region on the page, not only the console.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — role=status aria-live #runStatus / #vsStatus report 'add a <mask>' and prediction/comparison failures with an .err class.

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Label controls; announce state in a live region; keyboard-operable.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — labelled controls, prediction rows are keyboard-activatable buttons that fill the mask, live status region.

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Cross-document view transitions for catalogue↔page nav.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — @view-transition navigation:auto in the shared public/styles.css.

followUpGoals.goal: Add a WebGPU execution-provider fast path for camembert-fill-mask (honest WASM fallback retained) as an additive enhancement.

summary: Revision-2 agent matrix pass for camembert-fill-mask: real ~110 MB download + on-device run verified in headless Chrome (first-visit Download → 'Paris est la capitale de la France.' at 90 ms WASM; cached auto-init with no button; all four ladder pages produce real French output, console clean), plus the French-native vs multilingual comparison and the CamemBERT-fill → CamemBERT-POS multi-model chain. Light+dark and mobile+desktop screenshots reviewed (0px overflow, legible, operable controls). Auto-checkable conformance assertions pass (14/14 tested); manual-evidenced dimensions carry the agent verdict above.
